mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SRBA_V_PROC_CNT_BRNO(BAS_YYMM, PROC_FLD_C, PROC_LGDV_C, PROC_MDDV_C, PROC_SMDV_C, BRNO_CNT) SELECT M.BAS_YYMM ,M.PROC_FLD_C ,M.PROC_LGDV_C ,M.PROC_MDDV_C ,M.PROC_SMDV_C ,NVL(BRNO_CNT,0) BRNO_CNT FROM ( SELECT M.BAS_YYMM ,M.PROC_FLD_C ,M.PROC_LGDV_C ,M.PROC_MDDV_C ,M.PROC_SMDV_C FROM SRBA_V_PROC_M M WHERE 1=1 AND M.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND PROC_FLD_C = '1' AND M.USYN = 1 AND VALT_METH_C = '1' ) M ,( SELECT BAS_YYMM ,PROC_FLD_C, PROC_LGDV_C, PROC_MDDV_C, PROC_SMDV_C, COUNT(DISTINCT VALT_BRNO) BRNO_CNT FROM ( SELECT BAS_YYMM ,PROC_FLD_C, PROC_LGDV_C, PROC_MDDV_C, PROC_SMDV_C ,VALT_BRNO ,RSK_INDCT ,VALT_CNT FROM SRBA_V_RSK_CNT_R WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND VALT_CNT > 0 ORDER BY BAS_YYMM ,PROC_FLD_C, PROC_LGDV_C, PROC_MDDV_C, PROC_SMDV_C ,VALT_BRNO ,RSK_INDCT ) M GROUP BY BAS_YYMM ,PROC_FLD_C, PROC_LGDV_C, PROC_MDDV_C, PROC_SMDV_C ) A WHERE 1=1 AND M.PROC_SMDV_C = A.PROC_SMDV_C(+)

INSERT INTO SRBA_V_RSK_BAS_I(BAS_YYMM, PROC_FLD_C, PROC_LGDV_C, PROC_MDDV_C, PROC_SMDV_C, RSK_CATG, RSK_FAC, RSK_INDCT, VALT_AVG_V, VALT_STDDEV, DR_DT, DR_TIME, DR_OP_JKW_NO) SELECT #{basYymm} BAS_YYMM ,M.PROC_FLD_C, M.PROC_LGDV_C, M.PROC_MDDV_C, M.PROC_SMDV_C, M.RSK_CATG, M.RSK_FAC, M.RSK_INDCT ,ROUND(INDCT_TOT_VAL / DECODE(BRNO_CNT,'',1,0,1,BRNO_CNT),1) VALT_AVG_V ,VALT_STDDEV ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24MISS') ,'SYSTEM' FROM (SELECT T.PROC_FLD_C, T.PROC_LGDV_C, T.PROC_MDDV_C, T.PROC_SMDV_C ,T.RSK_CATG ,T.RSK_FAC ,T.RSK_INDCT, INDCT_TOT_VAL ,VALT_STDDEV FROM (SELECT PROC_FLD_C, PROC_LGDV_C, PROC_MDDV_C, PROC_SMDV_C ,RSK_CATG ,RSK_FAC ,RSK_INDCT ,SUM(BRNO_TOT_VAL) INDCT_TOT_VAL FROM (SELECT PROC_FLD_C, PROC_LGDV_C, PROC_MDDV_C, PROC_SMDV_C, VALT_BRNO, RSK_CATG, RSK_FAC, RSK_INDCT, SUM(VALT_CNT) BRNO_TOT_VAL FROM SRBA_V_RSK_CNT_R WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYMM BETWEEN TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{basYymm},'YYYYMM'), -36),'YYYYMM') AND #{basYymm} GROUP BY PROC_FLD_C, PROC_LGDV_C, PROC_MDDV_C, PROC_SMDV_C ,VALT_BRNO ,RSK_CATG ,RSK_FAC ,RSK_INDCT ) M WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY PROC_FLD_C, PROC_LGDV_C, PROC_MDDV_C, PROC_SMDV_C ,RSK_CATG ,RSK_FAC ,RSK_INDCT ) T ,(SELECT PROC_FLD_C, PROC_LGDV_C, PROC_MDDV_C, PROC_SMDV_C, RSK_CATG, RSK_FAC, RSK_INDCT, ROUND(STDDEV(VALT_CNT),2) VALT_STDDEV --, DECODE(ROUND(STDDEV(VALT_CNT),2),0,1,ROUND(STDDEV(VALT_CNT),2)) VALT_STDDEV FROM SRBA_V_RSK_CNT_R WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYMM BETWEEN TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{basYymm},'YYYYMM'), -36),'YYYYMM') AND #{basYymm} GROUP BY PROC_FLD_C, PROC_LGDV_C, PROC_MDDV_C, PROC_SMDV_C ,RSK_CATG ,RSK_FAC ,RSK_INDCT ) T1 WHERE 1=1 AND T.PROC_FLD_C = T1.PROC_FLD_C AND T.PROC_LGDV_C = T1.PROC_LGDV_C AND T.PROC_MDDV_C = T1.PROC_MDDV_C AND T.PROC_SMDV_C = T1.PROC_SMDV_C AND T.RSK_CATG = T1.RSK_CATG AND T.RSK_FAC = T1.RSK_FAC AND T.RSK_INDCT = T1.RSK_INDCT ) M ,(SELECT PROC_FLD_C, PROC_LGDV_C, PROC_MDDV_C, PROC_SMDV_C, SUM(BRNO_CNT) BRNO_CNT FROM SRBA_V_PROC_CNT_BRNO WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYMM BETWEEN TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{basYymm},'YYYYMM'), -36),'YYYYMM') AND #{basYymm} GROUP BY PROC_FLD_C, PROC_LGDV_C, PROC_MDDV_C, PROC_SMDV_C ) A WHERE 1=1 AND M.PROC_FLD_C = A.PROC_FLD_C AND M.PROC_LGDV_C = A.PROC_LGDV_C AND M.PROC_MDDV_C = A.PROC_MDDV_C AND M.PROC_SMDV_C = A.PROC_SMDV_C

INSERT INTO SRBA_V_RSK_R(BAS_YYMM, PROC_FLD_C, PROC_LGDV_C, PROC_MDDV_C, PROC_SMDV_C, RSK_CATG, RSK_FAC, RSK_INDCT, VALT_BRNO, STD_PNT, H_PNT, RT_PNT, RSK_VALT_PNT, DR_DT, DR_TIME, DR_OP_JKW_NO) SELECT BAS_YYMM ,PROC_FLD_C ,PROC_LGDV_C ,PROC_MDDV_C ,PROC_SMDV_C ,RSK_CATG ,RSK_FAC ,RSK_INDCT ,VALT_BRNO ,STD_PNT ,H_PNT ,RT_PNT ,ROUND((H_PNT * RT_PNT) / 100 ,2) RSK_VALT_PNT ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24MISS') ,'SYSTEM' FROM (SELECT M.BAS_YYMM ,M.PROC_FLD_C ,M.PROC_LGDV_C ,M.PROC_MDDV_C ,M.PROC_SMDV_C ,M.RSK_CATG ,M.RSK_FAC ,M.RSK_INDCT ,VALT_BRNO ,STD_PNT ,(CASE WHEN STD_PNT = 0 THEN 0 ELSE (CASE WHEN (14*STD_PNT)+50 < 1 THEN 1 WHEN (14*STD_PNT)+50 > 100 THEN 100 ELSE (14*STD_PNT)+50 END) END) H_PNT ,JIPYO_ALLT RT_PNT FROM (SELECT BAS_YYMM ,PROC_FLD_C ,PROC_LGDV_C ,PROC_MDDV_C ,PROC_SMDV_C ,RSK_CATG ,RSK_FAC ,RSK_INDCT ,VALT_BRNO ,(CASE WHEN VALT_AVG_V = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND((VALT_CNT - VALT_AVG_V ) / VALT_STDDEV,2) END) STD_PNT FROM (SELECT M.BAS_YYMM ,M.PROC_FLD_C ,M.PROC_LGDV_C ,M.PROC_MDDV_C ,M.PROC_SMDV_C ,VALT_BRNO ,M.RSK_CATG ,M.RSK_FAC ,M.RSK_INDCT ,VALT_CNT ,VALT_AVG_V ,DECODE(VALT_STDDEV,0,1,VALT_STDDEV) AS VALT_STDDEV --표준편차 FROM SRBA_V_RSK_CNT_R M ,SRBA_V_RSK_BAS_I A WHERE 1=1 AND M.BAS_YYMM = A.BAS_YYMM AND M.PROC_FLD_C = A.PROC_FLD_C AND M.PROC_LGDV_C = A.PROC_LGDV_C AND M.PROC_MDDV_C = A.PROC_MDDV_C AND M.PROC_SMDV_C = A.PROC_SMDV_C AND M.RSK_CATG = A.RSK_CATG AND M.RSK_FAC = A.RSK_FAC AND M.RSK_INDCT = A.RSK_INDCT AND M.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} ORDER BY M.BAS_YYMM , M.PROC_FLD_C , M.PROC_LGDV_C , M.PROC_MDDV_C , M.PROC_SMDV_C , VALT_BRNO , M.RSK_CATG , M.RSK_FAC , M.RSK_INDCT ) M ) M, SRBA_RSK_ALLT_I C WHERE 1=1 AND M.BAS_YYMM = C.BAS_YYMM AND M.RSK_CATG = C.RSK_CATG AND M.RSK_FAC = C.RSK_FAC AND M.RSK_INDCT = C.RSK_INDCT ) M

INSERT INTO SRBA_V_LST_RSK_R(BAS_YYMM, PROC_FLD_C, PROC_LGDV_C, PROC_MDDV_C, PROC_SMDV_C, VALT_BRNO, VALT_PNT, DR_DT, DR_TIME, DR_OP_JKW_NO) SELECT BAS_YYMM ,PROC_FLD_C ,PROC_LGDV_C ,PROC_MDDV_C ,PROC_SMDV_C ,VALT_BRNO ,VALT_PNT ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24MISS') ,'SYSTEM' FROM ( SELECT BAS_YYMM ,PROC_FLD_C ,PROC_LGDV_C ,PROC_MDDV_C ,PROC_SMDV_C ,VALT_BRNO ,SUM(RSK_VALT_PNT) VALT_PNT FROM SRBA_V_RSK_R M WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} GROUP BY BAS_YYMM ,PROC_FLD_C ,PROC_LGDV_C ,PROC_MDDV_C ,PROC_SMDV_C ,VALT_BRNO UNION ALL SELECT BAS_YYMM ,PROC_FLD_C ,PROC_LGDV_C ,PROC_MDDV_C ,PROC_SMDV_C ,VALT_BRNO ,RSK_VALT_PNT FROM SRBA_V_HRSK_R WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} ORDER BY VALT_BRNO ,PROC_SMDV_C ) M
mapper.update: UPDATE SRBA_V_LST_RSK_R M SET RSK_VALT_RT = ( SELECT RSK_VALT_RT FROM ( SELECT BAS_YYMM ,PROC_FLD_C ,PROC_LGDV_C ,PROC_MDDV_C ,PROC_SMDV_C ,VALT_BRNO ,VALT_PNT ,ROUND(PERCENT_RANK() OVER(PARTITION BY PROC_SMDV_C ORDER BY VALT_PNT) * 100,2) RSK_VALT_RT FROM SRBA_V_LST_RSK_R M WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYMM BETWEEN TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{basYymm},'YYYYMM'), -36),'YYYYMM') AND #{basYymm} ORDER BY VALT_BRNO ,PROC_SMDV_C ) T WHERE T.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND M.BAS_YYMM = T.BAS_YYMM AND M.PROC_FLD_C = T.PROC_FLD_C AND M.PROC_LGDV_C = T.PROC_LGDV_C AND M.PROC_MDDV_C = T.PROC_MDDV_C AND M.PROC_SMDV_C = T.PROC_SMDV_C AND M.VALT_BRNO = T.VALT_BRNO ) WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm}

UPDATE SRBA_V_TONGJE_R M SET TONGJE_VALT_RT = ( SELECT TONGJE_VALT_RT FROM ( SELECT BAS_YYMM ,TONGJE_FLD_C, TONGJE_LGDV_C, TONGJE_MDDV_C, TONGJE_SMDV_C ,VALT_BRNO ,TONGJE_VALT_PNT ,ROUND(PERCENT_RANK() OVER(PARTITION BY TONGJE_SMDV_C ORDER BY TONGJE_VALT_PNT ) * 100,2) TONGJE_VALT_RT FROM SRBA_V_TONGJE_R WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYMM BETWEEN TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{basYymm},'YYYYMM'), -36),'YYYYMM') AND #{basYymm} ORDER BY TONGJE_SMDV_C, VALT_BRNO ) T WHERE T.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND M.BAS_YYMM = T.BAS_YYMM AND M.TONGJE_FLD_C = T.TONGJE_FLD_C AND M.TONGJE_LGDV_C = T.TONGJE_LGDV_C AND M.TONGJE_MDDV_C = T.TONGJE_MDDV_C AND M.TONGJE_SMDV_C = T.TONGJE_SMDV_C AND M.VALT_BRNO = T.VALT_BRNO ) WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SRBA_V_PROC_TONGJE_R(BAS_YYMM, PROC_FLD_C, PROC_LGDV_C, PROC_MDDV_C, PROC_SMDV_C, VALT_BRNO, TONGJE_VALT_PNT, DR_DT, DR_TIME, DR_OP_JKW_NO) SELECT M.BAS_YYMM ,M.PROC_FLD_C ,M.PROC_LGDV_C ,M.PROC_MDDV_C ,M.PROC_SMDV_C ,VALT_BRNO ,NVL(TONGJE_VALT_PNT+DEPT_VALT_PNT, 0) TONGJE_VALT_PNT ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24MISS') ,'SYSTEM' FROM ( SELECT M.BAS_YYMM ,PROC_FLD_C ,PROC_LGDV_C ,PROC_MDDV_C ,PROC_SMDV_C ,VALT_BRNO ,SUM(TONGJE_VALT_PNT)TONGJE_VALT_PNT FROM ( SELECT M.BAS_YYMM ,M.PROC_FLD_C ,M.PROC_LGDV_C ,M.PROC_MDDV_C ,M.PROC_SMDV_C ,TONGJE_FLD_C ,TONGJE_LGDV_C ,TONGJE_MDDV_C FROM SRBA_V_PROC_M M ,SRBA_PROC_TJ_MP A WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND M.PROC_FLD_C = A.PROC_FLD_C AND M.PROC_LGDV_C = A.PROC_LGDV_C AND M.PROC_MDDV_C = A.PROC_MDDV_C AND M.PROC_SMDV_C = A.PROC_SMDV_C AND USYN = 1 ) M ,SRBA_V_TONGJE_R A WHERE 1=1 AND M.BAS_YYMM = A.BAS_YYMM AND M.TONGJE_FLD_C = A.TONGJE_FLD_C AND M.TONGJE_LGDV_C = A.TONGJE_LGDV_C AND M.TONGJE_MDDV_C = A.TONGJE_MDDV_C AND M.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND VALT_BRNO NOT IN ( SELECT DTL_C FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R999' ) GROUP BY M.BAS_YYMM ,PROC_FLD_C ,PROC_LGDV_C ,PROC_MDDV_C ,PROC_SMDV_C ,VALT_BRNO ) M ,( SELECT M.BAS_YYMM ,PROC_FLD_C ,PROC_LGDV_C ,PROC_MDDV_C ,PROC_SMDV_C ,SUM(TONGJE_VALT_PNT) DEPT_VALT_PNT FROM ( SELECT M.BAS_YYMM ,M.PROC_FLD_C ,M.PROC_LGDV_C ,M.PROC_MDDV_C ,M.PROC_SMDV_C ,TONGJE_FLD_C ,TONGJE_LGDV_C ,TONGJE_MDDV_C FROM SRBA_V_PROC_M M ,SRBA_PROC_TJ_MP A WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND M.PROC_FLD_C = A.PROC_FLD_C AND M.PROC_LGDV_C = A.PROC_LGDV_C AND M.PROC_MDDV_C = A.PROC_MDDV_C AND M.PROC_SMDV_C = A.PROC_SMDV_C AND USYN = 1 ) M ,SRBA_V_TONGJE_R A WHERE 1=1 AND M.BAS_YYMM = A.BAS_YYMM AND M.TONGJE_FLD_C = A.TONGJE_FLD_C AND M.TONGJE_LGDV_C = A.TONGJE_LGDV_C AND M.TONGJE_MDDV_C = A.TONGJE_MDDV_C AND M.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND VALT_BRNO IN ( SELECT DTL_C FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R999' ) GROUP BY M.BAS_YYMM ,PROC_FLD_C ,PROC_LGDV_C ,PROC_MDDV_C ,PROC_SMDV_C ) A WHERE M.BAS_YYMM = A.BAS_YYMM AND M.PROC_FLD_C = A.PROC_FLD_C AND M.PROC_LGDV_C = A.PROC_LGDV_C AND M.PROC_MDDV_C = A.PROC_MDDV_C AND M.PROC_SMDV_C = A.PROC_SMDV_C
mapper.update: UPDATE SRBA_V_PROC_TONGJE_R M SET TONGJE_VALT_RT = ( SELECT TONGJE_VALT_RT FROM ( SELECT BAS_YYMM ,PROC_FLD_C, PROC_LGDV_C, PROC_MDDV_C, PROC_SMDV_C ,VALT_BRNO ,TONGJE_VALT_PNT ,ROUND(PERCENT_RANK() OVER(PARTITION BY PROC_SMDV_C ORDER BY TONGJE_VALT_PNT ) * 100,2) TONGJE_VALT_RT FROM SRBA_V_PROC_TONGJE_R WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYMM BETWEEN TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{basYymm},'YYYYMM'), -36),'YYYYMM') AND #{basYymm} ORDER BY PROC_SMDV_C, VALT_BRNO ) T WHERE T.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND M.BAS_YYMM = T.BAS_YYMM AND M.PROC_FLD_C = T.PROC_FLD_C AND M.PROC_LGDV_C = T.PROC_LGDV_C AND M.PROC_MDDV_C = T.PROC_MDDV_C AND M.PROC_SMDV_C = T.PROC_SMDV_C AND M.VALT_BRNO = T.VALT_BRNO ) WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SRBA_V_REMDR_R(BAS_YYMM, PROC_FLD_C, PROC_LGDV_C, PROC_MDDV_C, PROC_SMDV_C, VALT_BRNO, RSK_VALT_PNT, RSK_VALT_RT, TONGJE_VALT_PNT, TONGJE_VALT_RT, REMDR_RSK_PNT, REMDR_RSK_GD_C, DR_DT, DR_TIME, DR_OP_JKW_NO) SELECT BAS_YYMM ,PROC_FLD_C ,PROC_LGDV_C ,PROC_MDDV_C ,PROC_SMDV_C ,VALT_BRNO ,RSK_VALT_PNT ,RSK_VALT_RT ,TONGJE_VALT_PNT ,TONGJE_VALT_RT ,REMDR_RSK_PNT ,NVL(GET_LEVE_CODE(#{basYymm},REMDR_RSK_PNT),'G') REMDR_RSK_GD_C ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24MISS') ,'SYSTEM' FROM ( SELECT M.BAS_YYMM ,M.PROC_FLD_C ,M.PROC_LGDV_C ,M.PROC_MDDV_C ,M.PROC_SMDV_C ,M.VALT_BRNO ,VALT_PNT RSK_VALT_PNT ,RSK_VALT_RT ,TONGJE_VALT_PNT ,TONGJE_VALT_RT ,ROUND((RSK_VALT_RT * (100 -TONGJE_VALT_RT)) / 100 ,2) REMDR_RSK_PNT FROM SRBA_V_LST_RSK_R M ,SRBA_V_PROC_TONGJE_R A WHERE 1=1 AND M.BAS_YYMM = A.BAS_YYMM AND M.PROC_FLD_C = A.PROC_FLD_C AND M.PROC_LGDV_C = A.PROC_LGDV_C AND M.PROC_MDDV_C = A.PROC_MDDV_C AND M.PROC_SMDV_C = A.PROC_SMDV_C AND M.VALT_BRNO = A.VALT_BRNO -- AND M.VALT_BRNO NOT IN ( SELECT DTL_C FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R999' ) AND M.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} ) M

INSERT INTO SRBA_V_LST_REMDR_R(BAS_YYMM, VALT_BRNO, RSK_VALT_PNT, RSK_VALT_RT, TONGJE_VALT_PNT, TONGJE_VALT_RT, REMDR_RSK_PNT, REMDR_RSK_GD_C, DR_DT, DR_TIME, DR_OP_JKW_NO) SELECT BAS_YYMM, VALT_BRNO, ROUND(AVG(RSK_VALT_PNT),2) AS RSK_VALT_PNT, ROUND(AVG(RSK_VALT_RT),2) AS RSK_VALT_RT, ROUND(AVG(TONGJE_VALT_PNT),2) AS TONGJE_VALT_PNT, ROUND(AVG(TONGJE_VALT_RT),2) AS TONGJE_VALT_RT, (CASE WHEN VALT_BRNO IN (SELECT DTL_C FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R328') THEN ROUND(AVG(TONGJE_VALT_RT),2) ELSE ROUND(AVG(RSK_VALT_RT)*(100-AVG(TONGJE_VALT_RT))/100,2) END) AS REMDR_RSK_PNT, (CASE WHEN VALT_BRNO IN (SELECT DTL_C FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R328') THEN CASE WHEN AVG(TONGJE_VALT_PNT) < (0.8*AVG(TONGJE_VALT_RT)) THEN 'R' WHEN AVG(TONGJE_VALT_PNT) >= (0.8*AVG(TONGJE_VALT_RT)) AND AVG(TONGJE_VALT_PNT) < (0.9*AVG(TONGJE_VALT_RT)) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'G'END ELSE NVL(GET_LEVE_CODE(#{basYymm},ROUND(AVG(RSK_VALT_RT)*(100-AVG(TONGJE_VALT_RT))/100,2)),'G') END) AS REMDR_RSK_GD_C, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24MISS'), 'SYSTEM' FROM SRBA_V_REMDR_R WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} GROUP BY BAS_YYMM,VALT_BRNO

INSERT INTO SRBA_RPT_VALT_I(BAS_YYMM, VALT_YYMM, R5_RSK_R, R5_RSK_Y, R5_RSK_G, R5_TONGJE_R, R5_TONGJE_Y, R5_TONGJE_G, DR_DT, DR_TIME, DR_OP_JKW_NO) SELECT BAS_YYMM, BAS_YYMM, SUM(DECODE(NVL(GET_LEVE_CODE(#{basYymm},RSK_VALT_RT),'G'),'R',1,0)) AS R5_RSK_R, SUM(DECODE(NVL(GET_LEVE_CODE(#{basYymm},RSK_VALT_RT),'G'),'Y',1,0)) AS R5_RSK_Y, SUM(DECODE(NVL(GET_LEVE_CODE(#{basYymm},RSK_VALT_RT),'G'),'G',1,0)) AS R5_RSK_G, SUM(DECODE(NVL(GET_LEVE_CODE(#{basYymm},TONGJE_VALT_RT),'G'),'R',1,0)) AS R5_TONGJE_R, SUM(DECODE(NVL(GET_LEVE_CODE(#{basYymm},TONGJE_VALT_RT),'G'),'Y',1,0)) AS R5_TONGJE_Y, SUM(DECODE(NVL(GET_LEVE_CODE(#{basYymm},TONGJE_VALT_RT),'G'),'G',1,0)) AS R5_TONGJE_G, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24MISS'), 'SYSTEM' FROM SRBA_V_LST_REMDR_R WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} GROUP BY BAS_YYMM

INSERT INTO SRBA_V_PROC_TONGJE_R(BAS_YYMM, PROC_FLD_C, PROC_LGDV_C, PROC_MDDV_C, PROC_SMDV_C, VALT_BRNO, TONGJE_VALT_PNT, TONGJE_VALT_RT, DR_DT, DR_TIME, DR_OP_JKW_NO) SELECT M.BAS_YYMM ,M.PROC_FLD_C ,M.PROC_LGDV_C ,M.PROC_MDDV_C ,M.PROC_SMDV_C ,VALT_BRNO ,NVL(TONGJE_VALT_PNT, 0) TONGJE_VALT_PNT ,( SELECT NVL(ROUND(AVG(TONGJE_VALT_PNT),2),0) FROM SRBA_V_PROC_TONGJE_R WHERE VALT_BRNO = M.VALT_BRNO AND PROC_SMDV_C = M.PROC_SMDV_C AND BAS_YYMM BETWEEN TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{basYymm},'YYYYMM'), -36),'YYYYMM') AND #{basYymm} ) TONGJE_VALT_RT ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24MISS') ,'SYSTEM' FROM ( SELECT M.BAS_YYMM ,PROC_FLD_C ,PROC_LGDV_C ,PROC_MDDV_C ,PROC_SMDV_C ,VALT_BRNO ,SUM(TONGJE_VALT_PNT)TONGJE_VALT_PNT FROM ( SELECT M.BAS_YYMM ,M.PROC_FLD_C ,M.PROC_LGDV_C ,M.PROC_MDDV_C ,M.PROC_SMDV_C ,TONGJE_FLD_C ,TONGJE_LGDV_C ,TONGJE_MDDV_C FROM SRBA_V_PROC_M M ,SRBA_V_PROC_TJ_MP A WHERE 1=1 AND M.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND M.BAS_YYMM = A.BAS_YYMM AND M.PROC_FLD_C = A.PROC_FLD_C AND M.PROC_LGDV_C = A.PROC_LGDV_C AND M.PROC_MDDV_C = A.PROC_MDDV_C AND M.PROC_SMDV_C = A.PROC_SMDV_C AND M.PROC_FLD_C = '2' AND USYN = 1 ) M ,SRBA_V_TONGJE_R A WHERE 1=1 AND M.BAS_YYMM = A.BAS_YYMM AND M.TONGJE_FLD_C = A.TONGJE_FLD_C AND M.TONGJE_LGDV_C = A.TONGJE_LGDV_C AND M.TONGJE_MDDV_C = A.TONGJE_MDDV_C AND M.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND VALT_BRNO IN ( SELECT DTL_C FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R999' ) GROUP BY M.BAS_YYMM ,PROC_FLD_C ,PROC_LGDV_C ,PROC_MDDV_C ,PROC_SMDV_C ,VALT_BRNO ) M

INSERT INTO SRBA_V_REMDR_R(BAS_YYMM, PROC_FLD_C, PROC_LGDV_C, PROC_MDDV_C, PROC_SMDV_C, VALT_BRNO, RSK_VALT_PNT, RSK_VALT_RT, TONGJE_VALT_PNT, TONGJE_VALT_RT, REMDR_RSK_PNT, REMDR_RSK_GD_C, DR_DT, DR_TIME, DR_OP_JKW_NO) SELECT M.BAS_YYMM ,M.PROC_FLD_C ,M.PROC_LGDV_C ,M.PROC_MDDV_C ,M.PROC_SMDV_C ,M.VALT_BRNO ,0 RSK_VALT_PNT ,0 RSK_VALT_RT ,TONGJE_VALT_PNT ,TONGJE_VALT_RT ,TONGJE_VALT_PNT REMDR_RSK_PNT ,(CASE WHEN TONGJE_VALT_PNT < (0.8*TONGJE_VALT_RT) THEN 'R' WHEN TONGJE_VALT_PNT >= (0.8*TONGJE_VALT_RT) AND TONGJE_VALT_PNT < (0.9*TONGJE_VALT_RT) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'G' END) REMDR_RSK_GD_C ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24MISS') ,'SYSTEM' FROM SRBA_V_PROC_TONGJE_R M WHERE 1=1 AND M.VALT_BRNO IN ( SELECT DTL_C FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R999' ) AND M.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm}
mapper.update: UPDATE SRBA_VALT_SCHD_M SET ING_STEP = #{ingStep} WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SRBA_V_REMDR_R WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm}
